name: What proof do I need that chemicals at work caused my lung issues?

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need that chemicals at work caused my lung issues?

acceptedAnswer.text: Doctor's causation letter, exposure records, witnesses.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical records, expert opinions, exposure logs, and coworker testimony linking symptoms to workplace toxins.** Causation requires doctors confirming job exposure as primary cause.[9][6] Key evidence: safety data sheets, air tests, incident reports. Preserve samples, track symptoms timeline. Hire a toxicologist if long-term.

description: Doctor's causation letter, exposure records, witnesses.[9]
